notifications.deviceNativeHelper: Receive notifications on your device when a task is due
notifications.mobileOnlyHelper: This feature is only available on mobile devices
notifications.dueDateNotificationHelper: Notification when the task is due
notifications.preDueNotificationHelper: Notification a few hours before the task is due
notifications.overdueNotificationHelper: Notification when the task is overdue
notifications.pushNotificationsHelper: Receive reminders, announcements, and task assignments via push notifications
notifications.registeredDevicesDescription: Devices registered to receive push notifications for your account
notifications.currentDeviceUnregistered: This device is not registered for push notifications
notifications.noRegisteredDevices: No devices registered for push notifications
notifications.customDescription: Notifications through other platforms such as Telegram or Pushover
notifications.telegramSetup: You need to send a message to the bot before Telegram notifications will work.
notifications.chatIdHelp: If you do not know your chat ID, start a chat with userinfobot and it will send you your chat ID.
notifications.userInfoBot: to start a chat with userinfobot
notifications.registrationInitiatedMessage: Push notification registration has been started. The device will register automatically.
notifications.registrationFailedMessage: Failed to automatically register device. Please try again.
notifications.deviceRegisteredMessage: Device registered successfully for push notifications.
notifications.deviceLimitReachedMessage: You have reached the maximum limit of 5 registered devices. Remove one before registering this device.
notifications.permissionRequiredMessage: Push notification permission is required to register this device.
notifications.notificationPermissionDeniedMessage: You denied notification permissions. You can enable them later in your device settings.
notifications.pushPermissionDeniedMessage: Push notifications were disabled. You can enable them in your device settings if needed.
notifications.testBody: You have a task due soon
